title.en: Many of the Supreme Domain Ancestors were shocked.

content.en:
"Seventy-two Zuwen !!"

Many of the Supreme Domain Ancestors were shocked.

If it was just a few ancestral texts, it might not be of much use to many Supreme Domain Ancestors, because each Ancestral Text represented a Dao, and a few Ancestral Texts represented several Daos, and for the Supreme Domain Ancestors who did not conform to the Dao, it was useless to comprehend such an Ancestral Text.

For example, if the Supreme Domain Ancestor who comprehended the forbidden path of fire did not have the Fire Ancestor Text, but only a few other Ancestral Texts, then they would not be able to obtain benefits.

And the seventy-two ancestral texts are different, this covers many paths, as long as the luck is not bad, you will basically find the ancestral texts that suit you, so as to improve your domain skills or holy skills.

At this time, many domain ancestors were probing the ancestral texts one by one, but no one went to snatch the ancestral relics, because they all knew that they could not take them.

Soon, the ancestral texts of what Dao these seventy-two ancestral texts represented, were all analyzed by the domain ancestors.

"There is even an ancestral text that represents the path of emptiness!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

Although the Ancestor of the Void is far from being able to compare with the Ancestor of the Void Method, the Ancestor of the Void is a consumable, and if you enter the Ancestral Text of the Void represented by the Ancestor Text to comprehend and cultivate the Spatial Sacred Technique, the effect will be very good.

Of course, a Zuwen can't hold too many ginseng enlightenments, otherwise the consumption rate will be very fast, and the gains outweigh the losses.

Therefore, many Supreme Domain Ancestors were very dignified, and they all wanted to enter the Ancestral Texts to cultivate, but they didn't want too many Domain Ancestors to enter, otherwise the Ancestral Texts would be exhausted, and they would lose this opportunity.

"Ten Thousand Laws Holy Son, this is the territory of your Terran Race, how should you divide the cultivation quota of this Ancestral Sacred Relic? If your Terran Race wants to occupy it all, then let's fight!"

A Supreme Domain Ancestor spoke.

Other domain ancestors also responded, making it clear that they would not give up.

Ye Tian knew very well that even if he joined forces with all the other Supreme Domain Ancestors of the Battle Gate, he would not be able to compete with all the Supreme Domain Ancestors.

So.

"Yes, but the number of places for the Alien Domain Ancestors is limited, according to the normal division, one Ancestral Wen is suitable for 100 Supreme Domain Ancestors to participate in the Enlightenment, I will give you 2,000 places, so it's always okay, right?" Ye Qingtian proposed.

2,000 names is not a few, after all, there are many Supreme Domain Ancestors from the Dark Sacred Domain this time, not very many, just thousands of Supreme Domain Ancestors, and the others are all top Domain Ancestors.

Therefore, many Supreme Domain Ancestors can obtain this place.

Next, those foreign domain ancestors fought for the cultivation quota.

Some domain ancestors who had no background were kicked out one by one, and if there were domain ancestors who resisted, they were directly killed.

Soon after, 2,000 places were almost confirmed.

On the Terran side, there are a lot of places, after all, except for the 1,000 additional names given to the ancestors of the Battle Gate Domain, the other places are all attributed to the Terrans.

In this regard, many of the top domain ancestors of the Battle Gate had opinions, but they were of little use, and they could not resist Ye Tian.

After all, Ye Tian's combat power is so strong, where can these top domain ancestors resist!

As for the Supreme Domain Ancestors of the Battle Gate, there is no opinion, because the 200 Supreme Domain Ancestors have all won the quota!

There are also many domain ancestors of the human race now, and even ordinary domain ancestors who have just broken through have also obtained quotas.

Ye Tian even gave some places to the half-step domain ancestors who were gifted with demons among the human race, in order to cultivate them.

this day.

Ye Tian and many domain ancestors blocked this area to prevent their cultivation from being disturbed.

"I don't care what grievances you have, once you enter this ancestral artifact to cultivate, you must not fight, otherwise you will destroy your cultivation, then you will be expelled immediately!"

Ye Tian spoke.

In this regard, the other Supreme Domain Ancestors had no opinion.

Whoa!!!!

A Celestial Ancestor flew into the Ancestral Texts inside the black bell, only to see that these Ancestral Texts kept flickering, swallowing a Celestial Ancestor.

And Ye Tian flew into the empty character ancestral text that represented the empty way.

The Ancestral Text of the Void, the Inner Space.

Many domain ancestors sat cross-legged and began to comprehend and cultivate one by one, without disturbing each other.

Ye Tian also began to comprehend and cultivate, he had two spatial holy skills, one was the void slash, and the other was the empty escape holy technique!

Of course.

He didn't expect to be able to cultivate all the two holy techniques to the limit level, but if it was combined with the effect of the Void Ancestor Method and the Void Ancestor Text, there might be hope that he would be able to cultivate the Void Slash to the limit level before this Void Ancestor was exhausted.

As for the other holy skills, it was hopeless, even if no one snatched them from him, those Zuwen couldn't help him comprehend the other holy skills to the extreme level.

After all, he currently only has one Ancestral Method.

Time passed slowly, and hundreds of thousands of years passed in the blink of an eye.

At this time, the ancestral texts on the black bell holy relics were extremely dim, and it was obvious that the ancestral texts were not far from disappearing.

At this time, many domain ancestors have made great progress, especially the human domain ancestors, and the progress is even greater.

This is not to say that the human domain ancestors are talented, but their strength is weak and their foundation is weak, so the improvement is naturally greater.

And those domain ancestors from the Dark Sanctuary have all cultivated for a long time, and there is little room for improvement, so the improvement is not much.

I have to say that this time the Ancestral Relics came to the Enlightenment, allowing the Domain Ancestors of the Race to catch up with the Domain Ancestors of the Dark Sacred Domain.

this day.

Ye Tian opened his eyes, and his eyes were full of joy.

At this time, his Void Slashing Saint Technique had already broken through, and he had stepped from the Consummation Realm to the extreme level.

This also means that his Void Slash Saint Skill has really come to an end and cannot continue to improve.

And the Void Slash Holy Technique of the Extreme Rank is ten times more powerful than the Holy Skill of the Perfection Level, and of course it consumes more energy.

However, as soon as the Void Slash Saint Technique broke through, Ye Tian's strength also increased in an instant.

Before, he was able to exert the second-grade combat power of the Supreme Domain Ancestor with the help of the Forbidden Yuan Blade, but now he can have the second-grade combat power of the Supreme Domain Ancestor without the help of the Forbidden Yuan Blade.

The Void Slash Holy Technique broke through, and Ye Tian also tried to improve the Void Escape Holy Technique.

However, only ten thousand years later, the Ancestral Text of the Void was shattered.

Rumble!!!!

The Empty Ancestral Wen Space disappeared, and Ye Tian and the others returned to the outside world.

At this time, the other ancestral texts also crumbled one by one, and only a few ancestral texts remained, but they couldn't last long.
